name: Reset Password
description: Password reset form (/reset-password?token=spec-ci-reset-token). The harness's routeForSpec override carries the ?token= query param so the token-present branch renders the 'Reset Your Password' form instead of redirecting to /forgot-password. No mount-time API call (the POST only fires on form submit, which this read-only spec never triggers). The heading and submit button prove the token-present branch rendered. Runs in the unauth lane (requiresUnauthenticated). Ports auth-flows.spec.ts reset-password section. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Password reset form
states.description: The token-present branch renders the 'Reset Your Password' heading and form. The heading proves the token was read from the query param and the page did NOT redirect to /forgot-password (which is the no-token behavior).

assertions.description: 'Reset Your Password' heading — proves the token-present branch rendered.
